\tzpentry{ID5833}{Delta Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5833 introduces Delta Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \delta_\epsilon(x) &= \frac{1}{(\sqrt{\pi}\epsilon)^4}\exp\!\left(-\frac{\|x\|^2}{\epsilon^2}\right), \qquad \int_{\mathbb{R}^4}\delta_\epsilon(x)\,d^4x = 1. \end{align}
